mapper.select: SELECT role.* FROM role INNER JOIN user_role ON role.id = user_role.role_id WHERE user_role.user_id = #{id}

SELECT DISTINCT b.id, b.name, b.i18n_key, b.api_code FROM user_role ur INNER JOIN role_button rb ON ur.role_id = rb.role_id INNER JOIN button b ON rb.button_id = b.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY b.api_code ASC NULLS LAST, b.id ASC

-- 统计每日注册用户数 WITH grouped_data AS ( SELECT TO_CHAR(users.create_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS create_date, COUNT(*) AS user_count FROM users WHERE users.deleted = 0 GROUP BY create_date ORDER BY create_date DESC LIMIT 30 ) SELECT create_date, user_count FROM grouped_data ORDER BY create_date;
